---
name: "Survey To Ideas"
description: "Generate candidate research ideas from selected survey notes, paper notes, or venue survey outputs."
argument-hint: "survey report, paper keys, topic, or venue"
agent: "agent"
---

Generate a shortlist of research ideas from the selected material.

For each idea:

- identify the research gap
- state a concrete hypothesis
- suggest a minimal validation experiment
- call out major risks
- mention which papers or reports inspired it

Prefer ideas that are plausible for systems, architecture, or AI systems work.
